Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Congratulations! You won![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Did that get your heart fluttering? Well, if you want to be successful in life, then come see me.[n]{f 1 5 0}Where am I? Hint: "Pau."[n]=========================[n]Do not reply to this message. Please contact us through the official inquiry portal.[n]©Amazing Commodities Corp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Southern cassowary kills hu...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...As if![n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be at "Pau" today as well. Come right away.[n]=========================[n]Do not reply to this message. Please contact us through the official inquiry portal.[n]©Amazing Commodities Corp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm a girl looking for a good ti...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Well, well, well... Look at you, getting all excited over a message.[n]{f 1 5 0}Let's correct that personality of yours. Come see me right away.[n]=========================[n]Do not reply to this message. Please contact us through the official inquiry portal.[n]©Amazing Commodities Corp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}URGENT!!! Amazing Commodi...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Listen. Do NOT fall for these kinds of tricks, all right?[n]{f 1 5 0}If you want to learn more life skills, come see me right away.[n]=========================[n]Do not reply to this message. Please contact us through the official inquiry portal.[n]©Amazing Commodities Corp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your application has been s...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Do you feel confident nobody could ever fool you? Well, think again![n]{f 1 5 0}Come see me right away. I'll give you a special nighttime lecture.[n]=========================[n]Do not reply to this message. Please contact us through the official inquiry portal.[n]©Amazing Commodities Corp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}FLASH SALE! 100% OFF ON...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This time, it's real. I'm in a good mood, so come see me if you want to hear all about it.[n]=========================[n]Do not reply to this message. Please contact us through the official inquiry portal.[n]©Amazing Commodities Corp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How old are you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you're in high school, that makes you around... 16? 17 years old? Don't ask me about my age though.[n]{f 1 5 0}Come quickly now. Time is money.[n]=========================[n]Do not reply to this message. Please contact us through the official inquiry portal.[n]©Amazing Commodities Corp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Beware of fundraising sca...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Isn't it exhausting, having to doubt everything you see or hear?[n]{f 1 5 0}People can be quite cruel and malicious... Is that really all right?[n]=========================[n]Do not reply to this message. Please contact us through the official inquiry portal.[n]©Amazing Commodities Corp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}CLOSEOUT SALE! Thanks fo...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Don't worry, it's not about my business.[n]{f 1 5 0}I do, however, have something very important to tell you, so come quickly.[n]=========================[n]Do not reply to this message. Please contact us through the official inquiry portal.[n]©Amazing Commodities Corp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Appointment[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Did you forget? In that case, I'll head on home if you don't show up soon.[n]=========================[n]Do not reply to this message. Please contact us through the official inquiry portal.[n]©Amazing Commodities Corp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ready to go♪ in your TV♪ Ta...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Well? Is it stuck in your head? ♪♪♪[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}Come quickly now.[n]=========================[n]Do not reply to this message. Please contact us through the official inquiry portal.[n]©Amazing Commodities Corp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reminder: Appointment[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Stop fooling around. Come right now.[n]=========================[n]Do not reply to this message. Please contact us through the official inquiry portal.[n]©Amazing Commodities Corp.[n]{f 1 1}
